themes: The walk of shame back to the outfield after striking out

New season, same last place finish, same great time
The unofficial MVP award going to whoever buys the first round
rotationNote: Script picks the next unused theme in order, cycling back to the start once the list is exhausted. Add new kickball-specific themes here anytime; expand to other sports once they're live in the store.
